zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez於大約1012年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。她於1029年與Geoffrey de Percy在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1058年在她的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez于大约1012年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克。她于1029年与Geoffrey de Percy在法国諾門迪结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1058年在她的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Forez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English forrai ‘plunder, booty; foray, foraging expedition’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez was born about 1012, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. She married Geoffrey de Percy in 1029, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died about 1058, in her hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez est née environ 1012, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Percy en 1029, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1058, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez wurde um 1012 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren. Sie hat 1029 in Normandie, Frankreich Geoffrey de Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb um 1058 im Alter von 48 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez è nata il circa 1012 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Percy nel 1029, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì circa 1058, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Forezは約1012年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた。1029年にフランスノーマンディでGeoffrey de Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1058年に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez(은)는 대략 1012년 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1029년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Geoffrey de Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1058년 그녀의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez nasceu aproximadamente 1012, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Percy em 1029, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1058, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez родилась около 1012 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Percy в 1029 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла около 1058 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Forez nació aproximadamente 1012, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Se casó con Geoffrey de Percy en 1029, en Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1058, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años.
